## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it belongs in this reference implementation.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
- [ ] `npm run check:secrets`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] No credentials, private media, complete real task IDs, or temporary result URLs included

## Safety and compatibility

Describe cost, security, migration, and Ark API conformance implications.
